connectors.name: Generic REST & Webhook CRM Blueprint
connectors.description: Template MCP server for querying REST endpoints and receiving webhooks from SMB SaaS platforms like HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.
connectors.author: Tadpole OS Core

connectors.name: SMB Accounting Blueprint
connectors.description: Connect to lightweight SMB accounting platforms like QuickBooks and Xero. Mirrors invoicing workflows.
connectors.author: Tadpole OS Core

connectors.name: Hardware & Edge Device Blueprint
connectors.description: Template MCP server for connecting to local serial interfaces (RS-232/USB scales) and Modbus TCP devices (thermal/pressure sensors).
connectors.author: Tadpole OS Core

connectors.name: Local Log Scanner & File Parser
connectors.description: Parses structured logs and local flat files for continuous state observation.
connectors.author: Community
